scope.details: Unstaged diff stayed inside wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/index.html, wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/scripts/overview.js, and wild_boar_proxy/web_design_ui/styles/overview.css; new contour screenshots were under audit_results/ui_web_accounts_canonical_stabilization_pass_screenshots/.

command_boundaries.details: BROWSER_ACTION_PAYLOAD_KEYS stayed ["account_id", "route_id"]; accountActionButton still dispatches only ui_action plus account_id; route actions still dispatch only route_id.

bulk_selection.details: The bulk validate control is disabled and not wired to command execution.

accounts_visual.details: #accountsScreen contains no inline svg tags; visible screen icons use img assets; row actions are collapsed to the dots menu.

live_failure_truth.details: Live readonly failure screenshot and code show net-data copy rather than healthy-looking zero counts.

leak_scan.details: No added forbidden external reference service strings were found in the touched UI diff.
